prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
(register_investigation_candidate primary_component_a)
(attach_diagnostic_tool_to_entity primary_component_a diagnostic_analyzer)
(assign_test_case_to_entity primary_component_a test_case_repro)
(prepare_analysis_for_entity primary_component_a test_case_repro)
(mark_interface_stable primary_component_a interface_v1 test_case_repro)
(attach_execution_environment_to_entity primary_component_a execution_env_docker)
(finalize_primary_component_ready primary_component_a interface_v1 execution_env_docker)
(detach_execution_environment_from_entity primary_component_a execution_env_docker)
(detach_test_case_from_entity primary_component_a test_case_repro)
(register_investigation_candidate dependent_component_b)
(attach_diagnostic_tool_to_entity dependent_component_b diagnostic_profiler)
(assign_test_case_to_entity dependent_component_b test_case_repro)
(prepare_analysis_for_entity dependent_component_b test_case_repro)
(mark_protocol_state_stable dependent_component_b protocol_state_v1 test_case_repro)
(attach_execution_environment_to_entity dependent_component_b execution_env_docker)
(finalize_dependent_component_ready dependent_component_b protocol_state_v1 execution_env_docker)
(detach_execution_environment_from_entity dependent_component_b execution_env_docker)
(detach_test_case_from_entity dependent_component_b test_case_repro)
(assemble_patch_bundle primary_component_a dependent_component_b interface_v1 protocol_state_v1 patch_bundle_initial)
(assign_test_case_to_entity primary_component_a test_case_repro)
(mark_patch_bundle_tested patch_bundle_initial primary_component_a test_case_repro)
(mark_primary_component_diagnosed primary_component_a patch_bundle_initial)
(mark_dependent_component_diagnosed dependent_component_b patch_bundle_initial)
(assign_fix_candidate_to_entity primary_component_a trace_record_1 test_case_repro)
(apply_fix_to_primary_component primary_component_a diagnostic_analyzer trace_record_1)
(detach_test_case_from_entity primary_component_a test_case_repro)
(assign_test_case_to_entity dependent_component_b test_case_repro)
(assign_fix_candidate_to_entity dependent_component_b trace_record_1 test_case_repro)
(apply_fix_to_dependent_component dependent_component_b diagnostic_profiler trace_record_1)
(detach_test_case_from_entity dependent_component_b test_case_repro)
(register_investigation_candidate repository_module_core)
(attach_diagnostic_tool_to_entity repository_module_core diagnostic_analyzer)
(assign_test_case_to_entity repository_module_core test_case_repro)
(prepare_analysis_for_entity repository_module_core test_case_repro)
(execute_test_suite_against_bundle repository_module_core regression_suite_a patch_bundle_initial)
(flag_module_preparation repository_module_core regression_suite_a patch_bundle_initial test_case_repro)
(attach_binary_artifact_to_module repository_module_core binary_artifact_v1)
(attach_execution_environment_to_entity repository_module_core execution_env_docker)
(mark_module_build_ready_without_protocol_flag repository_module_core binary_artifact_v1 execution_env_docker regression_suite_a patch_bundle_initial)
(attach_review_note_to_module repository_module_core review_note_initial)
(start_module_review repository_module_core review_note_initial regression_suite_a patch_bundle_initial)
(finalize_module_verification_without_label repository_module_core)
(assign_fix_candidate_to_entity repository_module_core trace_record_1 test_case_repro)
(apply_fix_to_module repository_module_core diagnostic_analyzer trace_record_1)
(detach_test_case_from_entity repository_module_core test_case_repro)
(detach_binary_artifact_from_module repository_module_core binary_artifact_v1)
(detach_review_note_from_module repository_module_core review_note_initial)
(detach_execution_environment_from_entity repository_module_core execution_env_docker)
(register_investigation_candidate repository_module_aux)
(attach_diagnostic_tool_to_entity repository_module_aux diagnostic_profiler)
(assign_test_case_to_entity repository_module_aux test_case_repro)
(prepare_analysis_for_entity repository_module_aux test_case_repro)
(execute_test_suite_against_bundle repository_module_aux regression_suite_b patch_bundle_initial)
(flag_module_preparation repository_module_aux regression_suite_b patch_bundle_initial test_case_repro)
(attach_binary_artifact_to_module repository_module_aux binary_artifact_v1)
(attach_execution_environment_to_entity repository_module_aux execution_env_docker)
(mark_module_build_ready_without_protocol_flag repository_module_aux binary_artifact_v1 execution_env_docker regression_suite_b patch_bundle_initial)
(attach_review_note_to_module repository_module_aux review_note_initial)
(start_module_review repository_module_aux review_note_initial regression_suite_b patch_bundle_initial)
(finalize_module_verification_without_label repository_module_aux)
(assign_fix_candidate_to_entity repository_module_aux trace_record_1 test_case_repro)
(apply_fix_to_module repository_module_aux diagnostic_profiler trace_record_1)
message.reasoning:
The problem involves repairing invariants for primary_component_a, dependent_component_b, repository_module_core, and repository_module_aux. The goal is to restore invariants for all of them.


## Examining system components  
- The task focuses on repairing invariants for primary_component_a, dependent_component_b, repository_module_core, and repository_module_aux.  
- The goal is to ensure all components maintain their invariants, restoring system stability.

## Examining system components  
- All entities—primary_component_a, dependent_component_b, repository_module_core, and repository_module_aux—must be registered as investigation candidates initially.  
- Entities include two types: entity_variant_a (primary and dependent components) and entity_variant_b (repository modules, marked as repair_target).  
- Initial facts involve availabilities and bindings like module associations, patchbundle, and testsuite bindings.  
- Actions for restoring invariants vary by entity type, with common steps like registering, diagnosing, and applying fixes.  
- The final step to restore invariants is applying fixes, which requires prior diagnosis and fix assignment.  

## Planning investigation steps  
- Register each entity as an investigation candidate using (register_investigation_candidate ?entity) for all four components.  
- Attach a diagnostic tool to each entity; available tools include diagnostic_analyzer, diagnostic_profiler, and diagnostic_tracer, with potential reuse after fixes.

## Planning investigation steps  
- Attach diagnostic_profiler to dependent_component_b and assign test_case_repro for analysis preparation.  
- Mark protocol_state_v1 stable for dependent_component_b and finalize it ready with execution_env_docker, then detach both test case and environment.  

## Preparing patch bundles  
- Assemble patch_bundle_initial using primary_component_a, dependent_component_b, interface_v1, and protocol_state_v1.  
- Reassign test_case_repro to primary_component_a to meet requirements, then mark patch_bundle_initial as tested.  

## Handling module invariants  
- Restore invariants for repository modules (entity_variant_b) by diagnosing through paths like finalize_module_verification_without_label or with_final_checks.  
- Diagnosing modules requires steps like preparation, building ready, and review, distinct from component processes.

## Executing Test Suites  
- Execute test suite regression_suite_a against patch_bundle_initial for repository_module_core, as analysis_prepared, module_testsuite_binding, and patch_bundle_tested conditions are met.  
- This sets test_suite_executed and bundle_validated_by_tests for regression_suite_a and patch_bundle_initial, marking the suite as unavailable afterward.  
- Similarly, plan to execute regression_suite_b for repository_module_aux, following the same validated process.  
- Test attachment is not required for execution, allowing tests to run with tests still attached from analysis preparation.  

## Preparing Module Flags  
- Set module_preparation_flag for repository_module_core using regression_suite_a, patch_bundle_initial, and test_case_repro, as all prerequisites like test_suite_executed and no interface_compatibility_flag are satisfied.  
- The process confirms analysis_prepared, module_testsuite_binding, and test_attachment remain intact, ensuring readiness for further module integration.

## Reviewing Component Preparation  
- Diagnostics remain attached to both primary_component_a and dependent_component_b after diagnosis.  
- Test cases were detached earlier but need reattachment to primary_component_a for patch testing.  

## Assembling Patch and Testing  
- Reattach test_case_repro to primary_component_a to prepare for patch_bundle_initial testing.  
- Mark patch_bundle_initial as tested after reattachment, ensuring test remains attached.  

## Assigning Fixes  
- Assign fix_candidate to primary_component_a using trace_record_1 and test_case_repro, consuming the available trace.  
- Apply the fix, ensuring diagnostic_analyzer is attached and setting invariant_restored for primary_component_a.

## Preparing Repository Module Aux  
- Register repository_module_aux as an investigation candidate for further analysis.  
- Attach diagnostic_profiler and test_case_repro to repository_module_aux to prepare for testing.  

## Executing Tests for Aux  
- Execute regression_suite_b against patch_bundle_initial for repository_module_aux, confirming all prerequisites like analysis_prepared and module_testsuite_binding are met.  
- Set bundle_validated_by_tests for regression_suite_b and patch_bundle_initial, marking the test suite as unavailable afterward.  

## Flagging and Building Module Aux  
- Flag module_preparation for repository_module_aux using regression_suite_b, patch_bundle_initial, and test_case_repro, ensuring no interface_compatibility_flag is set.  
- Attach binary_artifact_v1 and execution_env_docker, then mark repository_module_aux as build-ready without protocol flag, leveraging regression_suite_b and patch_bundle_initial.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
